How I Transformed My Physique in 90 Days With "Natty+" Supplements

The exact compounds, doses, and timeline I followed — everything I actually ran and what I noticed along the way.

Research & educational use only. These compounds are research chemicals. Nothing here is medical advice. Consult a licensed physician before using any of these compounds. My results are my own and not typical.
The Compounds
Retatrutide
0.5 mg / week
GLP-1 / GIP / Glucagon Triple Agonist

This was the foundation of the whole thing. I kept it at 0.5mg the entire time and didn't feel the need to push higher. Fat started coming off within the first few weeks and my appetite just... settled.

Timing
Once a week, subcutaneous. Same day every week.
Why 0.5mg
Full fat loss and appetite suppression without the GI issues of higher doses.

GHK-Cu
1–2 mg / day
Copper Peptide

Kept this in the whole cycle to protect skin and connective tissue. When you're leaning out fast, your skin takes a hit. GHK-Cu helped a lot with that.

Timing
Daily, subcutaneous. Lower end of the dose range.
What I Noticed
Skin held up way better than expected. Recovery felt cleaner too.

This one flies under the radar but I wouldn't cut it from the stack.

BPC-157
250–500 mcg / day
Body Protective Compound

My joints were taking a beating as training volume went up. BPC kept everything feeling manageable. No major flare-ups, which is honestly unusual for me.

Timing
Split into two shots per day — morning and evening, subcutaneous.
Paired With
TB-500 — BPC handles local tissue, TB-500 covers systemic recovery.

Running BPC-157 and TB-500 together was a good move. Together they just kept the body recovering fast enough to keep training hard.

How It Played Out
Weeks 1–2
Getting Started
Started Retatrutide at 0.5mg and brought in BPC-157 and GHK-Cu at the same time. First couple weeks were mostly just letting things settle. Appetite started regulating on its own and energy stabilized fast.
Weeks 3–6
Training Volume Goes Up
Pushed training harder as the stack settled in. By week 4 or 5 the fat loss was actually visible. Joints felt genuinely good, which never happens for me this far into a block.
Weeks 7–10
Deep Into the Recomp
Everything kept running. Body comp was shifting noticeably at this point. Energy was consistent and training quality stayed high.
Things Worth Knowing
Reconstitute Correctly
Use bacteriostatic water every time. Keep peptides at 2–8°C after mixing. Don't freeze them once reconstituted.
Track Your Protein
Retatrutide will suppress your appetite hard. Deliberately track protein to hit 1g per lb of bodyweight. Don't assume you're eating enough.
Get Bloodwork Done
Get a baseline before starting and check again at the midpoint. Glucose, lipids, liver markers. No exceptions.
